name: Friends
description:
Friends Season 1. Slide into the hit TV show Friends as the seventh cast member during the first season as a 26 year old neighbor having just moved in down the hall from Matt, Chandler, Rachel and Monica.

The Friends are Rachel Green (Jennifer Aniston), Monica Geller (Courteney Cox), Phoebe Buffay (Lisa Kudrow), Joey Tribbiani (Matt LeBlanc), Chandler Bing (Matthew Perry) and Ross Geller (David Schwimmer).

#Celebrity #Real #Famous #TV
